Off Calendar Sep-18-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D501)

Attorney, Timothy McFarlin (949-544-2640), appears telephonically via CourtCall for plaintiff/opposing party.
Attorney, Viddell Lee Heard (626-535-1900 ext. 256), appears telephonically via CourtCall for defedant/demurring party, Wells Fargo.
Attorney, Kirsten Stockton (310-318-1220), appears telephonically via CourtCall for defendant/opposing party, Eagle Vista Equities.

Defendants' Demurrer to Complaint is argued and submitted by plaintiff counsel. Defendants submit on the tentative. The tentative ruling stands. The demurrer is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Both causes of action are preempted by HOLA. Gonzalez v. Wells Fargo 2012 WL 5350035; Metzegr v. Wells Fargo Bank 2014 WL 1689278. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gary Dote, Esq. (949-544-2640) for Plaintiff/Opposing party Francisco Galvez through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

Plaintiff does not contest the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to September 18, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers and the optative complaint. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of opposition. All courtesy copies must be delivered to department 501 no later than August 21, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. The Court is in receipt of courtesy copies of reply. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
